feed.title: Ashwani Kumar: GSoC X JdeRobot 2026
feed.subtitle: GSoC 2026 blog — work, weekly updates, and notes from my project on RoboticsAcademy @ JdeRobot.

entry.title: Hello, GSoC 2026
entry.content:
Welcome! This is the first post on my GSoC 2026 blog.

I’ll be contributing to RoboticsAcademy — JdeRobot’s open-source framework for learning robotics, computer vision, and AI through interactive exercises.

Over the coming weeks I’ll use this space for:

  • Weekly updates — what I worked on, what I learned, what’s blocked.
  • Design notes — the reasoning behind non-obvious decisions.
  • Demos — short videos or screenshots as features come together.

More details about the project scope and timeline coming in the next post.
entry.summary: First post — kicking off my Google Summer of Code 2026 project on RoboticsAcademy @ JdeRobot.
